component.name: CategoryListItem
component.script:
sub init() m.focusRect = m.top.findNode("focusRect") m.nameLabel = m.top.findNode("nameLabel") end sub
sub onContentChanged() if m.top.itemContent <> invalid then m.nameLabel.text = m.top.itemContent.title end sub
sub onFocusChanged() if m.top.focusPercent > 0.5 then m.focusRect.opacity = 1 else m.focusRect.opacity = 0 end sub
